{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Nova-Bot ships
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Nova-Bot ships]] are available for use.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
